user.title: Connect to Control D
user.description: Enter a Control D API token to create one Home Assistant config entry for one authenticated Control D instance.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Control D API. Check network access and any token IP restrictions, then try again.
error.invalid_auth: The Control D API token was rejected. Check that the token is valid and has the required scope.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while validating the Control D API token.

abort.already_configured: This Control D instance is already configured.
abort.not_implemented: Control D Manager is currently a scaffold-only repository. The production config flow has not been implemented yet.

init.title: Control D settings
init.description: What would you like to configure?

data.auto_enable_service_switches: Auto-enable service controls for allowed service categories

data_description.managed_in_home_assistant: Turn off to exclude this profile and remove its entities from Home Assistant.
data_description.advanced_profile_options: Create the remaining profile option entities for this profile in disabled-by-default state.
data_description.endpoint_sensors_enabled: Create telemetry entities for devices under this profile.
data_description.endpoint_inactivity_threshold_minutes: How long before an endpoint is marked as inactive.
data_description.allowed_service_categories: Select which categories to expose as service controls.
data_description.auto_enable_service_switches: Warning: turning this on may create significant entity clutter if Control D adds new services.
data_description.exposed_custom_rules: Select specific custom rule folders or domains to expose as switches.

data_description.configuration_sync_interval_minutes: How often to fetch structural changes such as new rules and services. Default: 15.
data_description.profile_analytics_interval_minutes: How often to fetch high-level query and block counts. Default: 5.
data_description.endpoint_analytics_interval_minutes: How often to fetch granular device-level telemetry. Default: 5.

config_entry_not_found.message: The selected Control D config entry could not be found.

config_entry_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D config entry name could not be found.

config_entry_name_ambiguous.message: More than one Control D config entry has that name. Use the config entry ID instead.

config_entry_not_loaded.message: The selected Control D config entry is not currently loaded.

multiple_entries_loaded.message: More than one Control D config entry is loaded. Select a specific config entry or target a profile switch entity.

wrong_integration_entry.message: The selected config entry does not belong to Control D Manager.

profile_target_required.message: Select a Control D profile switch entity, config entry ID, or config entry name.

profile_target_not_found.message: The selected Control D profile target could not be resolved.

profile_target_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D profile target is ambiguous or belongs to a different config entry.

state.purpose_instance_action: Runs an on-demand synchronization for this Control D account

state.purpose_endpoint_status: Shows whether this endpoint is currently considered active based on the configured inactivity threshold

state.purpose_instance_status: Shows the current refresh health and account status for this Control D integration

state.purpose_instance_summary: Shows a summary count for the current Control D account
Shows a summary count for the current Control D account

state.purpose_profile_filter_mode: Changes the enforcement mode for the selected profile filter

state.purpose_profile_service: Changes the action applied to the selected Control D service

state.purpose_profile_default_rule: Changes the default action used for queries that do not match a more specific profile rule

state.purpose_profile_rule_group: Changes the folder-wide action for the selected custom rule folder

state.purpose_profile_option: Changes the selected Control D profile option

state.purpose_profile_pause: Pauses or resumes the selected Control D profile

state.purpose_profile_filter: Enables or disables the selected Control D profile filter

state.purpose_profile_option: Enables or disables the selected Control D profile option

state.purpose_profile_rule: Enables or disables the selected custom profile rule
